programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Belinda Henry/ Ashley Ervin
programme.desc: When Belinda Henry, a lonely divorcee, meets aspiring model, Keith Henry, her way of life shifts from pain to pleasure. Later, young love turns deadly when Keithron Fields walks into Ashley Ervin�s life.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Frank/Pedroza
programme.desc: Police Officer Antoinette Frank falls for a street thug and goes against everything she swore to protect by committing the most heinous blood bath New Orleans has ever seen. After falling for a local bad boy, teenager Linda Pedroza is willing to eliminate anyone who dares to come between them.

programme.title: Blood on Her Badge
programme.desc: After cold-hearted cop, Dee falls for an aggressive drug dealer they begin robbing drivers during routine traffic stops. Soon she starts taking greater risks, but her world comes crashing down when he convinces her to commit a violent robbery, resulting in the gruesome murder of three people.

programme.title: Deadly Dispatch
programme.desc: After her best friend IS tragically murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong, Tiffany Jackson takes justice in her own hands to find his killer.

programme.title: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Ripped from the true crime files of Fatal Attraction, a young woman fights for her life after being kidnapped by her obsessive ex-boyfriend, while her family will stop at nothing to find her.

programme.title: Safe Room
programme.desc: After Ian accidentally witnesses a break-in in the house across the street and records the horrific murder of the homeowner, Lila becomes embroiled in a deadly struggle to protect her son.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Mask of a Killer
programme.desc: When the family of Shalisa O’Dell find her beaten to death at home, police immediately look at her boyfriend and ex as suspects. But as they uncover more about Shalisa, including her moonlighting job at a gentleman’s club, the suspect list grows. Did someone develop a deadly obsession with Shalisa, or does this murder hit closer to home?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Storm of Lies
programme.desc: When pregnant mother Megan Price is found dead in her home, there’s evidence that multiple people didn’t want her new baby to see the light of day. But a storm of clues keep leading to dead ends – until an unexpected witness comes forward with a story of a loose-lipped killer.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Intercepting a Killer
programme.desc: When a young woman and her friend are gunned down outside her parent�s home, detectives struggle to find a motive for the attack. Was she collateral damage in a drive-by shooting, caught in the crossfire of a shootout, or a victim of a jealous rage?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Candice Martinez/genet Rembert
programme.desc: After Candice Martinez falls hard for her college sweetheart, she helps him with a daring plan to get quick cash. Teenager Genet Rembert gets involved with a manipulative pimp who uses her in an elaborate scheme filled with sex, drugs and money.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Annishia Smith/ Tina Young
programme.desc: When a young, Annishia Smith, meets handsome, David Bell, the couple use her sexual prowess in a game of cat and mouse to set a trap. Later, suburban housewife, Tina Young�s, dream of a different life manifests when she is introduced to a new high, Larry Tooley.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Cortnee Brantley/Regina Miller
programme.desc: Cortnee has fallen hard for her street-smart man Dontae but a joyride turns into one she�ll never forget and her loyalty will be put the ultimate test. - After life makes a mess, Regina Miller tidies up with a young handyman, but she�ll be forced to get her hands dirty to prove how down she really is.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Alexis Granger/Desirae Blanchard
programme.desc: In Sacramento, Alexis Granger�s future is as bright as the sun until her passion for a pimp lands her on a fast track of sin. In Savannah, Desirae Blanchard struggles to find her place in the world until true love sweeps her off her feet.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Jennifer Brundage/Chade Harris
programme.desc: Jennifer Brundage finds the love of her life and when distance threatens to keep them apart, she goes to great lengths to keep him. Chade Harris has always played by the rules, until she meets a man that takes her on an unlawful ride.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Fleeing into Danger
programme.desc: When Sudanese immigrant Anna Angok is found strangled to death in her apartment, police take the lack of forced entry as a sign that Anna may have known her killer. And as they dig deeper, they uncover a past full of trauma and violence.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: When a young woman arrives at the hospital with gunshot wounds, police attempt to locate the shooter. But when the victim passes away, solving the case seems easier said than done until a witness reveals information that turn the case on its head.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Hip Hop Homicide: Aaron Holloway
programme.desc: A shooting in a rap studio leaves one man dead and several critically injured. Quinn and Vince take over the cold case and must restart the investigation from the beginning to figure out who is responsible for the murder and robbery scheme.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Last Call: Jose Greer
programme.desc: A 911 call has officers rushing to an apartment complex for a robbery in progress. They arrive on the scene to find a man who has jumped to his death. Vince and Quinn must determine who is responsible for this terrible outcome and why.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Shot for Shot
programme.desc: When an accomplice to a 2006 murder is gunned down in a neighborhood bar three years later, police suspect the nephew of a world renowned boxer who waited patiently to seize his opportunity for revenge.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: As much as the glitz and glam of Tinseltown are intertwined into the fabric of Los Angeles, so is the LAPD. And when one of the force�s own goes on a deadly shooting rampage, the violent killings bring both the city, and the LAPD, to their knees.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Grave Betrayal
programme.desc: When a former Miss Bahamas contestant disappears in Florida, her family fears something horrible has happened to her. As detectives start investigating, they quickly focus on a jealous boyfriend and a secret hook-up with an off-duty cop – until an unexpected discovery reveals the horrifying last moments of the beauty queen.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Masked Secrets
programme.desc: A young Detroit woman seems to have it all – a loving family, a doting boyfriend, an exciting new job – until one day, she inexplicably goes missing. After she’s found dead, scandals and secrets come to light, pointing detectives to a killer overcome by rage.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Intercepting a Killer
programme.desc: When a young woman and her friend are gunned down outside her parent�s home, detectives struggle to find a motive for the attack. Was she collateral damage in a drive-by shooting, caught in the crossfire of a shootout, or a victim of a jealous rage?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Candice Martinez/genet Rembert
programme.desc: After Candice Martinez falls hard for her college sweetheart, she helps him with a daring plan to get quick cash. Teenager Genet Rembert gets involved with a manipulative pimp who uses her in an elaborate scheme filled with sex, drugs and money.
